/opt/homebrew/Cellar/emscripten/5.0.5/libexec/em++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -sWASM=1 -sMODULARIZE=0 -sEXPORT_ES6=0 -g2 -sALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1 -sENVIRONMENT=web,worker "-sEXPORTED_FUNCTIONS=['_malloc','_free','_orcatune_create_processor','_orcatune_destroy_processor','_orcatune_set_semitones','_orcatune_reset','_orcatune_process_interleaved']" "-sEXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS=['ccall','cwrap']" CMakeFiles/orcatune_wasm.dir/orcatune_wasm_entry.cpp.o
